name: Termination of Distilled Spirits Tax Lien

eligibility.description: Applies to proprietors of distilled spirits plants who withdraw spirits for export, vessel/aircraft supplies, or authorized research and testing.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: The first lien on distilled spirits is terminated when spirits are withdrawn from bonded premises free of tax for specific uses such as export, foreign-trade zone deposit, or research and development.
